subject: FedEx: Your Package Will Be Returned to Sender — Action Required Today
body:
FedEx Shipment Notification

Tracking Number: 7284 9102 3847
Status: DELIVERY EXCEPTION — Address Verification Needed

Dear Customer,

We attempted to deliver your package today but were unable to complete delivery due to an incomplete shipping address. This is your FINAL NOTICE before the package is returned to the sender.

Package Details:
- Tracking: 7284 9102 3847
- Weight: 2.4 lbs
- Sender: Amazon Marketplace
- Estimated Value: $289.99

To update your delivery address and schedule redelivery, please confirm your information within 24 hours:

https://fedex-tracking-update.com/redelivery?track=728491023847

You will need to verify:
- Full name
- Complete delivery address
- Phone number
- Payment of $3.99 redelivery fee (credit/debit card)

If we do not hear from you by March 19, 2026, the package will be returned to the sender and you will need to contact them for a refund or re-shipment.

Thank you for choosing FedEx.

FedEx Customer Support
fedex.com | 1-800-463-3339
